default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, LLM referrals, and upcoming content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends: 7.5% increase in overall completion rate, 24% increase for recently refreshed blogs](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [LLM referrals (e.g., ChatGPT) are driving significant traffic, mirroring organic search patterns](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Focus on creating expert-driven, niche content to capitalize on LLM traffic and differentiate from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Upcoming content: 6 new composability blogs going live, moving to SaaS topics next week](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Exploration report shows 7.5% increase in overall completion rate month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Recently refreshed blogs saw a 24% increase in completion rate](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Completion rate includes visits to capabilities, solutions, downloads, and sales pages](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Need to dig deeper into specific URLs users are clicking from blogs](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Jakub to investigate how to track discovery call requests from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### LLM Referral Traffic

  - [Significant increase in leads coming from ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic graph for Webstacks is the best Jakub has seen among clients](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [LLM traffic patterns closely mirror organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Users often see Webstacks mentioned in ChatGPT, then search directly for the brand](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Current strategy: treating ChatGPT/LLM traffic as part of organic search](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Content Strategy for LLMs

  - [Focus on creating content good for both Google and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Target longer-tail, more specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Develop hyper-focused expert content](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Identify niche topics with low competition but high relevance to audience](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Integrate thought leadership and expert perspectives into content](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

### Expert-Driven Content Development

  - [Create more long-form, syndication-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Incorporate Webstacks team's expertise and perspectives into briefs](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Consider developing video content (e.g., landing page breakdowns) to embed in blogs](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Jesse requests advice on capturing internal expertise effectively](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

### Content Updates and Planning

  - [4 composability blogs refreshed, 1 completely rewritten](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)

  - [Next week's focus: SaaS-related content](https://fathom.video/share/c7nSRtDWKPztRj-BU4xfZyspNWSK2xhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
